title: Ars Leaveus
description: Ars Leaveus | A Texturepack to change the leaves texture of Ars Nouveau to a less vibrant option.
body:
![Border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/375c821923a4af67ee7f1ed77b76084ffa842493.png) ##

About

**

The Ars Leaveus Texture pack aims to adjust the leaves in Ars Nouveau to be less vibrant and more similar to regular leaves. This is achieved by replacing the leaves with a more ordinary green colour and adjusting the golden streaks to be the associated colour of leaf in the default texture.

** --- ![Border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/375c821923a4af67ee7f1ed77b76084ffa842493.png) ##

Supported Textures

- **[Ars Nouveau](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau) - Vexing Archwood Leaves, Blazing Archwood Leaves, Cascading Archwood Leaves, and Flourishing Archwood Leaves** - **[Ars Elemental](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ars-elemental) - Flashing Archwood Leaves** --- ![Border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/375c821923a4af67ee7f1ed77b76084ffa842493.png) ##
